post.description: Accepts a single email verification request and processes it asynchronously.
Accepts bulk email verification requests in JSON and processes them asynchronously as one bulk job.
Accepts a CSV file with `email` column (optional `requestId`, `customerId`) and creates a bulk verification job.

get.description: Fetches single email verification status and detailed checks.
Fetches counters and state for a bulk email verification job.
Returns paginated item-level results for a bulk email verification job.
